title: Citrusy Light Ethiopian Chicken Toast
description: A comforting and citrusy Ethiopian dish featuring tender chicken, toasted bread, and a blend of aromatic spices, perfect for a light and satisfying meal. This halal-friendly recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, berbere spice mix, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the marinade.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 15 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, toast the bread slices until lightly browned.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Assemble the toast by placing a few slices of chicken on each bread slice, then topping with chopped parsley.
